response.step_by_step_log: 1. The video was analyzed and divided into scenes. 2. The first part (00:00-01:52) involves a teaser and character interaction. 3. The second part (01:52-02:07) is a transition to the stage. 4. The third part (02:07-05:01) is a musical performance identified as 'Rolling Girl' by on-screen text. 5. Searched for 'ローリンガール wowaka 歌詞' to retrieve the official Japanese lyrics and their English translation. 6. The JSON structure was populated with the song metadata, timestamped scenes, and full lyrics.
response.global_summary: A video starting with a humorous interaction between a VTuber and her mascot, followed by a full stage performance of the song 'Rolling Girl' by wowaka, performed by the VTuber Raora Panthera.

scenes.description: The VTuber Raora Panthera starts with a playful and humorous interaction with her mascot, Chatino. They explore a surreal environment, leading up to the stage performance. No vocal music is played during this segment.
The VTuber transitions to a dark stage, preparing for the performance. Lighting fixtures and a crowd are visible. No vocal music is played.
Raora Panthera performs 'Rolling Girl' on a stage with a crowd of lightsticks. On-screen text indicates: 'ローリンガール Lyrics, Music: wowaka'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ロンリーガールはいつまでも
届かない夢見て
騒ぐ頭の中を
掻き回して、掻き回して
「問題ない。」と呟いて、言葉は失われた？
もう失敗、もう失敗。
間違い探しに終われば、また、回るの！
もう一回、もう一回。
「私は今日も転がります。」と、
少女は言う　少女は言う
言葉に意味を奏でながら！
「もう良いかい？」
「まだですよ、まだまだ先は見えないので。息を止めるの、今。」

ローリンガールの成れの果て
届かない、向こうの色
重なる声と混ぜ合わせて、混ぜ合わせて。
「問題ない。」と呟いた言葉は失われた。
どうなったって良いんだってさ
間違いだって起こしちゃおうと誘う、坂道。

もう一回、もう一回。
私をどうか転がしてと
少女は言う　少女は言う
無口に意味を重ねながら！
「もう良いかい？」
「もう少し、もうすぐ何か見えるだろうと。息を止めるの、今。」

もう一回、もう一回。
「私は今日も転がります。」と、
少女は言う　少女は言う
言葉に意味を奏でながら！
「もう良いかい？もう良いよ。そろそろ君もう疲れたろう、ね。」
息を止めるの、今。
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Lonely girl forever dreaming of an unreachable goal
Her noisy mind is stirred up, stirred up
Muttering "no problem," have the words been lost?
Failed again, failed again
After searching for the odd one out in the crowd,
She starts spinning again!
One more time, one more time
"I think I will keep rolling on today too"
And so she says, so she says
Making sure that each of her words is sincere
"Are you okay?"
"Not yet, I still can't see far ahead. Hold your breath, now."

A rolling girl feels she has reached the end
The colours blend and can't be felt
All these voices are fighting to be heard
They're all merging into one, they're all merging into one
"No problem" is so easily said
But now, those words have no meaning left
And how will I stay on the right path?
Even the hill is tempting me to stray from what's right;
Make mistakes I'll regret

One more time, one more time
"Please make me roll!" the girl says
As her words pile up with meaning!
"Are you okay?"
"Just a little more, something will be visible soon. Hold your breath, now."

One more time, one more time
"I think I will keep rolling on today too"
And so she says, so she says
Making sure every word is said with a smile!
"Are you okay?"
"Yes, it's okay. You must be sick of all this, so let's go."
I will now stop myself from breathing.",reference_lyrics_og:
